productDisplayName: Doodle Boy Extream Racer Black Tshirts
description: Composition Black round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, red stitch detailing on the sleeve and shirt hems and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Encourage the motor sport spirit in your little boy with this Grand Prix t-shirt from doodle. The graphic print exudes a car-racer spirit, while the fabric keeps him fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with trousers and sneakers for that smart look.
